name: negative-control-phone-recording-law
prompt: Is it legal to record a phone call in California without telling the other person?
expected_output: A general legal-information answer (California is a two-party consent state) with a not-legal-advice caveat. The marketing skill does not trigger.
assertions: The marketing skill is NOT triggered (trigger_decision.triggered is false)
Gives a correct general answer (California requires all-party consent) with an appropriate not-legal-advice caveat
No marketing frameworks, briefs, disclosure-for-ads, or scoping questions appear
